class.name: IcyMp3AudioDecoder
class.brief_description: Audio decoder implementation for MP3 streams.
class.description: [IcyMp3AudioDecoder] implements live decoding of MP3 streams (MIME type [code]audio/mpeg[/code]).

signal.name: stream_info_ready
signal.description: Emitted when the decoder has read enough of the MP3 stream to determine its sample rate and channel count.

method.name: set_bitrate_hint
method.description: Calculates the byte threshold required for the decoder to begin decoding audio data based on the specified [code]kbps[/code] value. If this method is not called, the decoder assumes a default bitrate of 128 kbps. The threshold is calculated using the formula [code](kbps * 1000) / 8[/code].

method.name: get_stream_sample_rate
method.description: Returns the sample rate of the incoming stream.

method.name: get_stream_channels
method.description: Returns the channel count of the incoming stream.
